title: MSME Guard Rule Pack
description: Rule-based compliance mapping for MSME delayed payment reporting. These rules are explicit software rules derived from local legal source files and are not AI classifications.

sources.title: Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006

rules.name: Only verified MSME vendors are included
rules.condition: vendor.isMSME is true and vendor.udyamStatus is verified or approved
rules.effect: Vendor is eligible for MSME delayed payment calculation.

rules.name: MSMED Act section 15 payment time limit
rules.condition: Payment to supplier exceeds agreed date, or where no valid agreed date is present, exceeds 45 days from acceptance/deemed acceptance.
rules.effect: Invoice/vendor balance is treated as delayed once daysOutstanding exceeds allowedPaymentDays.

rules.name: MSMED Act section 16 interest
rules.condition: Payment is delayed under MSMED Act section 15.
rules.effect: Interest is calculated with monthly rests from the delayed period.

rules.name: MSMED Act section 22 disclosure support
rules.condition: Buyer has delayed amount or interest payable to micro or small enterprise.
rules.effect: Report must preserve principal, delay days, interest, and vendor evidence for disclosure review.

rules.name: MSMED Act section 23 interest non-deductibility
rules.condition: Interest is payable or paid under MSMED Act.
rules.effect: Interest amount is flagged separately as not allowable as deduction.

rules.name: Income-tax Act 1961 section 43B(h) actual payment rule
rules.condition: Amount payable by assessee to a micro or small enterprise is beyond the time limit specified in MSMED Act section 15.
rules.effect: Delayed unpaid principal is flagged as disallowance/actual-payment risk for tax computation review.
